PANGANI POLICE STATION — OCCURRENCE BOOK EXTRACT
OB No. 04/27/06/24
Date: 27 June 2024
Time recorded: 1135 hrs

Reporting officer: Sgt. Wambui (Service No. 64509)
Station: Pangani Police Station, Nairobi

Particulars:
On 27 June 2024, suspects Faith Wanjiku and Cynthia Akinyi (held in
connection with the 24 June 2024 Finance Bill protests) were brought to
Pangani Police Station from Central. They were placed in the female cells.
At 1430 hrs the same day, the suspect Faith Wanjiku reported feeling unwell
and was attended to by Cpl. Otieno who recorded a complaint of bruising on
the right shoulder and lower back. Medical attention was requested but the
station vehicle was unavailable.

The mother of Cynthia Akinyi, Mrs. Akinyi, presented at the station with
food. She was advised that the suspect could not receive visitors. Mrs.
Akinyi inquired about an OB number for the arrest. No OB was provided at
this counter.

Signed: Sgt. Wambui
